nasb.text: Then Darius the king wrote to all the peoples, nations and men of every language who were living in all the land: “May your peace abound!

esv.text: Then King Darius wrote to all the peoples, nations, and languages that dwell in all the earth: “Peace be multiplied to you.

cnv.text: 後來大利烏王寫信給住在全地的各國、各族和說各種語言的人，說：“願你們大享平安！

ccb.text: 后来，大流士王传谕境内的各族、各邦、各语种的人，说：“愿你们大享平安！
